productDisplayName: Nike Men Zoom Atlas+ Silver Sports Shoes
description: Choose the nike Zoom Atlas+ for a better Fit, smoother ride. A classic, refined. The nike Zoom Atlas+ running shoe combines the best Zoom features with an enhanced fit, smoother ride and lighter weight. Runners know and love this shoe for its plush, responsive cushioning. This shoe features heel and forefoot Nike Zoom units, along with a full-length, soft midsole for responsive cushioning and durability. Stretch mesh panels help lock down the midfoot while stretching and flexing with it for comfort and support. An inner-sleeve, or bootie, lends a plush fit and feel. For a smoother transition and cushioning when your heel hits the ground, this running shoe has a segmented crash pad below the heel. And areas of blown rubber on the outsole have been extended in the to promote a smooth, efficient stride while enhancing cushioning. Best for underpronators to neutral-gait runners Upper Mesh upper for breathability and an adaptable fit Leather overlays to support the foot Padded mush collar and tongue Lace-up system for customised snug fit Midsole Nike Impax at heel for cushioning and stability on impact Arch support to help stabilize the foot while letting you move more naturally Outsole Rubber outsole for traction and durability Flex grooves for flexibility and a smooth, efficient stride Lugs and grooves on outsole for traction and grip Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
